mapper.select: SELECT s.order_id AS orderId, s.order_history AS orderHistory, s.sample_id AS sampleId, s.sample_type AS sampleType, s.sample_position AS samplePosition, s.primer, s.primer_type AS primerType, s.primer_position AS primerPosition, s.primer_concentration AS primerConcentration, s.seq, s.project, s.carrier_name AS carrierName, s.antibiotic_type AS antibioticType, s.plasmid_length AS plasmidLength, s.fragment_size AS fragmentSize, s.test_result AS testResult, s.origin_concentration AS originConcentration, s.template_plate_no AS templatePlateNo, s.template_hole_no AS templateHoleNo, s.performance, s.return_state AS returnState, s.flow_name AS flowName, s.plate_no AS plateNo, s.hole_no AS holeNo, s.belong_company AS belongCompany, s.produce_company AS produceCompany, s.produce_id AS produceId, s.hole_number AS holeNumber, s.layout, s.origin_hole_no AS originHoleNo, s.belong_lab AS belongLab, s.report_status AS reportStatus, s.report_error_reason AS reportErrorReason, s.reimburse_status AS reimburseStatus, s.create_user AS createUser, s.create_time AS createTime, s.update_user AS updateUser, s.update_time AS updateTime, s.remark, c.id AS customerId, c.customer_name AS customerName, c.address AS customerAddress FROM yk_sample_info s LEFT JOIN yk_order_info o ON s.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN yk_customer_info c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE s.produce_id = #{produceId}

SELECT s.order_id AS orderId, s.order_history AS orderHistory, s.sample_id AS sampleId, s.sample_type AS sampleType, s.sample_position AS samplePosition, s.primer, s.primer_type AS primerType, s.primer_position AS primerPosition, s.primer_concentration AS primerConcentration, s.seq, s.project, s.carrier_name AS carrierName, s.antibiotic_type AS antibioticType, s.plasmid_length AS plasmidLength, s.fragment_size AS fragmentSize, s.test_result AS testResult, s.origin_concentration AS originConcentration, s.template_plate_no AS templatePlateNo, s.template_hole_no AS templateHoleNo, s.performance, s.return_state AS returnState, s.flow_name AS flowName, s.plate_no AS plateNo, s.hole_no AS holeNo, s.belong_company AS belongCompany, s.produce_company AS produceCompany, s.produce_id AS produceId, s.hole_number AS holeNumber, s.layout, s.origin_hole_no AS originHoleNo, s.belong_lab AS belongLab, s.report_status AS reportStatus, s.report_error_reason AS reportErrorReason, s.reimburse_status AS reimburseStatus, s.create_user AS createUser, s.create_time AS createTime, s.update_user AS updateUser, s.update_time AS updateTime, s.remark, c.id AS customerId, c.customer_name AS customerName, c.address AS customerAddress FROM yk_sample_info s LEFT JOIN yk_order_info o ON s.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN yk_customer_info c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE s.order_id = #{orderId} AND s.prouce_id in
#{produceId}
SELECT template_hole_no,produce_id FROM yk_sample_info WHERE template_plate_no = #{plateNo} AND template_hole_no IS NOT NULL AND template_hole_no != '' ORDER BY template_hole_no

SELECT s.order_id AS orderId, COUNT(*) AS templateNumber, MAX(c.customer_name) AS customerName, MAX(c.address) AS customerAddress, s.sample_id AS sampleId, MAX(s.sample_type) AS sampleType, MAX(s.primer) AS primer, MAX(s.primer_concentration) AS primerConcentration, MAX(s.carrier_name) AS carrierName, MAX(s.antibiotic_type) AS antibioticType, MAX(s.fragment_size) AS fragmentSize, MAX(s.test_result) AS testResult, MAX(s.origin_concentration) AS originConcentration, MAX(s.template_plate_no) AS templatePlateNo, MAX(s.template_hole_no) AS templateHoleNo, MAX(s.performance) AS performance, MAX(s.return_state) AS returnState, MAX(s.flow_name) AS flowName, MAX(s.create_user) AS createUser, MAX(s.origin_hole_no) AS originHoleNo, MAX(s.belong_lab) AS belongLab, MAX(s.report_status) AS reportStatus, MAX(s.report_error_reason) AS reportErrorReason, MAX(s.remark) AS remark FROM yk_sample_info s LEFT JOIN yk_order_info o ON s.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN yk_customer_info c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE template_plate_no = #{req.templateNo} GROUP BY s.order_id, s.sample_id

SELECT c.id AS customerId, c.customer_name AS customerName, c.email AS customerEmail, s.create_time AS createTime, s.order_id AS orderId, s.sample_id AS sampleId, s.return_state AS returnState, s.remark AS remark FROM yk_sample_info s LEFT JOIN yk_order_info o ON s.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN yk_customer_info c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE s.flow_name = '模板邮件' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' ORDER BY c.id, s.create_time DESC

SELECT s.order_id AS orderId, COUNT(*) AS templateNumber, MAX(c.customer_name) AS customerName, MAX(c.address) AS customerAddress, s.sample_id AS sampleId, MAX(s.sample_type) AS sampleType, MAX(s.primer) AS primer, MAX(s.primer_concentration) AS primerConcentration, MAX(s.carrier_name) AS carrierName, MAX(s.antibiotic_type) AS antibioticType, MAX(s.fragment_size) AS fragmentSize, MAX(s.test_result) AS testResult, MAX(s.origin_concentration) AS originConcentration, MAX(s.plate_no) AS plateNo, MAX(s.hole_no) AS holeNo, MAX(s.performance) AS performance, MAX(s.return_state) AS returnState, MAX(s.flow_name) AS flowName, MAX(s.create_user) AS createUser, MAX(s.produce_id) AS produceId, MAX(s.origin_hole_no) AS originHoleNo, MAX(s.belong_lab) AS belongLab, MAX(s.report_status) AS reportStatus, MAX(s.report_error_reason) AS reportErrorReason, MAX(s.remark) AS remark FROM yk_sample_info s LEFT JOIN yk_order_info o ON s.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN yk_customer_info c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE s.plate_no = #{req.plateNo} GROUP BY s.order_id, s.sample_id
mapper.update:
UPDATE yk_sample_info SET remark = CASE WHEN remark IS NULL OR remark = '' THEN #{remark} ELSE CONCAT(remark, ';', #{remark}) END WHERE produce_id IN
#{produceId}
